text: I feel a mix of curiosity and anticipation in this environment. The dim lighting, modern architecture, and glowing screens suggest a space devoted to innovation or discussion. The words "R + D" on the wall reinforce the idea of research and development, which makes me reflect on human progress and the serenity of a quiet, creative workplace. Yet, the emptiness makes the experience slightly unsettling—almost as if I am an observer in a place between thought and action.
